change_summary: Recorded a reproducible legacy LLM replay archive_context backfill audit artifact; no strategy behavior changed.
hypothesis: Legacy LLM replay attribution remains partially unauditable when saved response files lack archive_context; a narrow audit artifact can identify which existing replay days can be backfilled from decision logs without changing strategy behavior.

Unknown eligibility remains 3/13, so exp-20260426-039 cannot be completed by passive backfill alone.
